# PraisonAIBio

Open-source PraisonAI extension for BioModels.org systems biology.

Install: pip install praisonai-bio  (or pip install -e src/praisonai-bio from GitHub)
Import: import praisonai_bio
Docs: https://bio.praison.ai
Toolsets: sysbio-core, sysbio-full, simulation, biomodels-readonly, repro
Tools: 21 (11 T2B + 10 discovery) — see docs/tools-reference.md
Demo: workflows/cookbooks/glycolysis_demo.yaml (BIOMD0000000206)
